delivery_mode: hybrid(2weeks online Theory + 6 Weeks Theory and Practical Training)
short_summary: Build real industry experience, practical training, daily clinic ops.
full_description: 8-week program, combines theory, practical training, assessments, reviews...
schedule_notes: Twice a week, 10 am - 4 pm, 1 hr break
what_you_learn:
Client Services, Soft Skills, Therapist Roles, Skin type and condition
Cosmetics, Skin Structure and Functions, Myology of Body
Full Body Massage,
Cleansing,  Facial Massage, Cleansing, Deep Cleansing
Decolletage Massage,  Scalp Massage, Application of a Modeling Mask
Basic Extraction, Korean Hydrafacial Treatment
curriculum_outline:
week 1: Intro, Therapist Roles, Client Services, Soft skills, Skin type and condition
week 2: Cosmetics, Skin structure and Functions, Myology
week 3: Full Body Massge 
week 4: Facial Massage, Cleansing, Deep Cleansing
week 5: Decolletage Massage, Scalp Massage, Modeling mask
week 6 : Basic Extraction, Korean Hydrafacial Treatment
week 7:  Hands-On Practice with Classmate
week 8: Theory & Practical Test / Hands-On Practice with Real Clients

short_summary: Learn professional deep cleansing techniques.
full_description: A 5-hour comprehensive hands-on workshop to master Face deep cleansing.
what_you_learn: Cosmetic Product Types and Application Methods

short_summary: Learn professional Decollte Massage techniques
full_description: A 5-hour comprehensive hands-on workshop to master Decollte Massage
what_you_learn: Décolleté Massage Techniques and Types of Muscles

short_summary: Learn professional Face Massage techniques
full_description: A 5-hour comprehensive hands-on workshop to master Face Massage
what_you_learn: Face Massage Techniques and Types of Muscles

short_summary: Cosmetic Classification, Proper Usage, and Synergistic Effects with Aesthetic Devices
full_description:
Gain comprehensive knowledge of cosmetic types, ingredients, 
and proper application methods.
what_you_learn: Develop an understanding of cosmetic types, key ingredients, and proper application methods.

short_summary: Needling Infusion Ampoule Selection by Skin Type and Facial Area
full_description: Ampoule Classification and Targeted Application for Needling Infusion
what_you_learn: Needling Infusion Protocols and Ampoule Selection Strategy

short_summary: HIFU Protocols by Facial Area and Skin Type
full_description:
Understanding the principles of HIFU, selecting the appropriate skin type, 
choosing the correct depth, determining treatment intervals, and post-treatment care.
what_you_learn: HIFU Principles and Treatment Techniques for Different Skin Types and areas

full_description:
Understanding the difference between needling and ampoule infusion, 
learning absorption techniques based on ampoule types, 
and achieving optimal treatment results.
what_you_learn: Needling and Ampoule Infusion Techniques, Absorption Methods, and Expected Effects

short_summary: Chemical and Herbal Peeling Methods
full_description:
Understanding the differences between chemical and herbal peeling, 
selecting the appropriate skin type, and learning correct treatment procedures.
Post-treatment care
what_you_learn: Chemical vs Herbal Peeling: Skin Types, Indications, and Treatment Methods

short_summary: Classification of Pigmentation and Treatment Techniques
full_description:
Learn how to treat melasma, freckles, and pigmentation using Pico laser, 
how to select the appropriate wavelength based on pigment depth, and proper treatment techniques.
what_you_learn: Pico Laser Pigmentation Treatment, Wavelength Selection, and Clinical Techniques

short_summary: Endermologie Techniques for Face and Body Treatments
full_description: Learn face and body treatment protocols using the Endermologie device and understand the expected effects and clinical applications.
what_you_learn: Endermologie Protocols for Face and Body Treatments

short_summary: Clinical Skin Tag and Mole Removal Techniques
full_description: Learn safe techniques for removing whiteheads, skin tags, and minor skin lesions on the face and body, along with proper post-treatment care.
what_you_learn: Facial Contouring and Anti-Aging Using RF and Lifting Devices

short_summary: Advanced Facial Contouring Using Aesthetic Devices and Manual Techniques
full_description: Learn advanced facial contouring and anti-aging techniques using RF and lifting devices to achieve visible results in a single session.
what_you_learn: Minor Skin Lesion Removal Techniques and Post-Treatment Care

short_summary: Fat Freezing Technology and Treatment Protocols
full_description: Learn the principles of fat freezing, proper treatment methods, and how to combine cryolipolysis with other devices to enhance treatment results.
what_you_learn: Fat Freezing(Cryolipolysis) Principles, Treatment Methods, and Combination Techniques

short_summary: Fat Laser Technology and Treatment Protocols
full_description: Learn the principles of fat Laser, proper treatment methods, and how to combine Fat Laser with other devices to enhance treatment results.
what_you_learn: Fat Laser Principles, Treatment Methods, and Combination Techniques

short_summary: Fat Cavitation Technology and Treatment Protocols
full_description: Learn the principles of fat Cavitation, proper treatment methods, and how to combine Fat cavitation with other devices to enhance treatment results.
what_you_learn: Fat Cavitation Principles, Treatment Methods, and Combination Techniques

short_summary: Buccal Massage for Immediate Wrinkle Improvement
full_description: Learn the fundamentals of buccal massage, understand facial muscle movement and structure, and master techniques that deliver immediate visible results.
what_you_learn: Buccal Massage: Muscle Anatomy, Techniques, and Immediate Results

short_summary: Comprehensive Guide to Skin Types and Consideration Factors
full_description: Learn how to identify your skin type and understand how the skin changes depending on seasons, climate, and environmental conditions.
what_you_learn: Skin Type Analysis and Seasonal Skin Changes

short_summary: Understanding Cosmetic Categories and How to Use Them
full_description: Learn about different types of cosmetics, how to use them correctly, the differences between key ingredients, and how to choose the right products for your skin type.
what_you_learn: Cosmetic Types, Key Ingredients, and How to Choose the Right Products

full_description: Learn the structure of the skin and understand the role and characteristics of each layer and function.
what_you_learn: Skin Structure, Functions, and Characteristics

delivery_mode: online(Required Modules for Basic, Intermediate, and Advanced)

short_summary:
This module focuses on massage techniques designed to help relieve 
growing pains in children. Supports nervous system.
full_description: Learn the causes of growing pains in children, the correct massage areas, proper techniques, frequency of treatment, and how to control pressure safely.
what_you_learn: Baby anatomy, gentle techniques

short_summary: Therapeutic Massage for Lower Back Pain
full_description: Learn the causes of lower back pain, pain relief massage techniques, proper posture correction, and the relationship between muscles and the spine.
what_you_learn: Back Pain Relief and Postural Correction

short_summary: Abdominal Circulation Therapy for Women’s Health
full_description: Learn the relationship between the abdomen and lymphatic circulation, abdominal massage techniques, important precautions, and methods to relieve menstrual pain safely.
what_you_learn: Fundamentals of Abdominal Therapy and Techniques
